overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit night market with food stalls, red paper lanterns, and various NPCs. The player moves through the bustling market, stopping briefly at a vendor counter before continuing past cooking stalls and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk food market entrance with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the market entrance past food stalls and digital billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated vertical screen displaying an advertisement with a figure in purple
metal counter with stools and overhead fluorescent lighting
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging in rows overhead
cyan and pink neon tubes running along the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk night market with neon lighting. The camera moves forward past a food stall counter and a large vertical digital billboard, with red paper lanterns visible hanging overhead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: teal-lit food vendor counter with digital menu displays

events.description: stops at the teal-lit vendor counter to observe or interact

agents.ego_description: stopping at the vendor counter and focusing on the vendor working behind the teal-lit stall

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the counter, preparing food or handling items

entered.detail: food service counter illuminated with bright teal lighting and metal surfaces
illuminated screens displaying menu items mounted on the wall behind the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and stops at a teal-lit food vendor counter. A vendor is visible working behind the counter, with digital menu screens mounted on the wall. The previous billboard and initial stall are now behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market corridor with cooking stalls and steam

events.description: turns away from the counter and moves deeper into the market corridor
steam from cooking equipment becomes visible in the air

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market passage past various food preparation areas

entered.detail: large red vertical banner with 'WATAMI MARKET' text in black
open cooking area with grills and food preparation surfaces
visible steam and smoke rising from cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the counter, the camera turns and walks through a narrower market corridor. A red 'WATAMI MARKET' banner is visible on the right, and steam rises from food preparation counters. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: purple-lit market section with empty vendor seating

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from teal to purple neon tones
passes concrete stairs and structural pillars

agents.ego_description: walking past empty vendor tables and chairs in the purple-lit section

entered.detail: purple and magenta neon lighting fixtures illuminating the area
unoccupied plastic table with chairs and menu boards
concrete staircase leading upward with metal railings
large structural concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts to purple neon as the camera moves through a section with empty vendor tables and plastic chairs. Concrete stairs and pillars become visible in the background, and the cooking steam from the previous area dissipates.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy food stall area with bright overhead lighting

events.description: approaches a brightly lit food stall with intense overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy food stall with customers browsing and ordering

notable_agents.action: customer standing at the counter ordering food from the vendor

entered.detail: food stall with intense bright white lighting and visible cooking equipment
long counter with bowls and utensils, steam rising from food
harsh bright fluorescent lights illuminating the stall area

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy food stall area with bright overhead lighting. Red paper lanterns are now directly overhead, and a noodle bar counter is visible with customers ordering. The purple lighting and empty tables from the previous section are now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit night market that shifts from wide commercial corridors to narrow, steam-filled alleys before opening into a vibrant food court. It begins by moving past a large vertical digital billboard and food stalls under distant red paper lanterns. As the camera approaches and pauses at a teal-lit vendor counter with digital menus, the perspective then turns to navigate a narrower corridor where steam rises from cooking stations beneath a red Watami Market banner. The scene shifts into a section of purple neon lighting and empty plastic chairs near concrete pillars before the atmosphere brightens again. Finally, the camera emerges into a bustling noodle bar area where bright overhead lights and red paper lanterns illuminate customers ordering at the counter.
